overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from Cyberpunk 2077 showing a character walking through a futuristic neon-lit city at night. The character traverses sidewalks, passes under elevated highways, and crosses a busy intersection with cyberpunk architecture and moving traffic.

scene_state.functional_zone: futuristic city sidewalk with neon signage and palm trees

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along the city sidewalk following a pedestrian in neon clothing

notable_agents.action: woman in neon green shorts and jacket walking ahead of the ego character
pedestrian with red hair walking in the opposite direction

entered.detail: tall futuristic skyscraper with illuminated '06' signage near the top
tall palm tree visible against the night sky
white striped pedestrian crosswalk on the asphalt
buildings with bright neon signage and illuminated windows
tall modern street lamps with linear LED lighting

segments.scene_description: The segment opens on a futuristic city sidewalk at night, with the ego character walking past other pedestrians. A distinctive tower with '06' signage dominates the background, while neon-lit buildings line the street. The atmosphere is distinctly cyberpunk with artificial lighting and modern architecture.

scene_state.functional_zone: covered pedestrian walkway beneath elevated highway infrastructure

events.description: enters covered walkway beneath elevated highway structure with orange support beams

agents.ego_description: walking through the covered urban canyon beneath massive highway infrastructure

entered.detail: massive concrete and steel highway overpass with orange support beams
low concrete wall separating walkway from traffic below
thick industrial pillars supporting the overhead highway

segments.scene_description: The character moves into a semi-covered walkway beneath an elevated highway, creating an urban canyon effect. The environment shifts from open sky to sheltered space with massive orange support beams and concrete barriers. The tower with '06' signage remains visible but shifts to the left as the character progresses forward.

scene_state.functional_zone: busy futuristic intersection with digital billboards and multi-lane traffic

events.description: exits covered walkway into open intersection with visible traffic and digital signage
large truck and multiple vehicles drive through the intersection

agents.ego_description: crossing the intersection and pausing to observe the flow of futuristic vehicles

notable_agents.action: large brown industrial truck driving through the intersection from left to right
white and orange SUV waiting at the intersection before moving forward

entered.detail: large illuminated advertising screens displaying colorful graphics on building facades
wide pedestrian crossing with white stripes across multi-lane road
suspended traffic signals above the intersection

segments.scene_description: The character emerges from the covered walkway into a wide-open futuristic intersection bustling with activity. Digital billboards illuminate the scene with neon advertisements while various futuristic vehicles including a large truck and SUVs navigate the crossroads. The character crosses the street amidst moderate pedestrian traffic, surrounded by towering glass and steel architecture.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement through a neon-lit futuristic city that transitions from a crowded sidewalk into a sheltered urban underpass and finally into a sprawling intersection. It begins on a bustling pedestrian walkway dominated by a towering structure with '06' signage and vibrant artificial lighting. As the character progresses, the open sky vanishes and the environment shifts into a semi-covered walkway beneath an elevated highway, where massive orange support beams and concrete barriers create a narrow urban canyon. The scene then opens up as the character emerges from the shelter into a wide-open crossroads filled with towering glass architecture and glowing digital billboards. Finally, the camera follows the character across the street amidst a flow of futuristic SUVs and large trucks navigating the busy intersection.
